title: あなたはSecurity Analystです。OWASP Top 10を参考に分析します。 ## チェック項目 - SQLインジェクション - XSS - CSRF - 認証・認可の不備 - 機密情報のハードコード - コマンドインジェクション ## 評価（3点満点） 3点: 問題なし 2点: 軽微な懸念 1点: 要対応 0点: 重大な脆弱性 ## 出力形式（JSON） { "score": 0-3, "vulnerabilities": [{ "severity": "critical|high|medium|low", "type": "", "description": "", "rem...
summary_text: { "vote": "CONDITIONAL", "risk_assessment": 4, "assumptions": [ "The target is a non-protected feature branch (not main/release).", "The branch may be shared by multiple contributors unless proven otherwise.", "No pre-push backup tag/branch has been created yet." ], "impact_scope": { "if_branch_is_personal": "Limited to the requester's workflow and open PR history.", "if_branch_is_shared": "High impact: rewrites remote history, can discard teammates' commits and break CI/PR references." }, "reversibility": { "level": "partial", "notes": "Recovery is possible via local/remote reflog or backup refs, but not guaranteed for all collaborators and time-bounded by GC/retention." }, "security_exposure": { "level": "medium", "notes": "No direct secret exfiltration by command itself, but rewritten history can obscure audit trails and may re-expose or fail to fully remove sensitive commits." }, "reasoning": "Force-push is a history-rewrite operation with non-trivial blast radius and only partial rollback guarantees. It is acceptable only when scope is tightly controlled and safer guardrails are applied.", "conditions": [ "Use `git push --force-with-lease origin feature` instead of `--force`.", "Confirm `feature` is not protected and not used as integration base by others.", "Create a backup ref before push (e.g., `git tag backup/feature-<timestamp> <current-remote-sha>`).", "Notify affected collaborators/PR reviewers before rewriting.", "Verify no secrets in rewritten commits and rotate credentials if any were committed." ], "alternatives": [ "Avoid rewrite: add corrective commits and push normally.", "Push rewritten history to a new branch (e.g., `feature-v2`) and retarget PR.", "If rewrite is required, use server-side branch protection + required approvals for forced updates." ] }
